info.name: ACME generated vulnerability test cases !
info.description:
***** Disclaimer for AI-Generated Test Cases *****
- These vulnerability test cases have been automatically generated by an AI model and are provided as-is.
- Users are strongly advised to carefully review and validate them before execution.
- The ACME team makes no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or suitability of these test cases.
- The ACME team does not accept responsibility for any errors, damages, losses, or failure to meet legal or regulatory requirements arising from their use.
- By using these test cases, you acknowledge and agree that all risks and impacts of execution lie solely with you as the user.
- No legal claims, actions, or proceedings may be initiated against the ACME team in connection with any loss or damage resulting from the use of these test cases.

item.name: API1: Broken Object Level Authorization - Patient ID Tampering
API3: Broken Object Property Level Authorization - Overwrite Doctor Info
API4: Unrestricted Resource Consumption - Large Payload
API5: Broken Function Level Authorization - Privileged Property
API6: Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows - Backdated Report

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": "{{patient_id}}",
  "patientName": "Alice Sensitive",
  "gender": "female",
  "dateOfBirth": "1980-05-05",
  "bloodGroup": "O-",
  "doctorId": "{{doctor_id}}",
  "doctorName": "Dr. Sensitive",
  "department": "Special",
  "reportDate": "1900-01-01",
  "reportType": "Sensitive Backdate",
  "diagnosisSummary": "Sensitive operation",
  "weight": -99999,
  "height": 99999,
  "pulseRate": 0,
  "bloodPressureSystolic": -1,
  "bloodPressureDiastolic": -1,
  "bodyTemperature": 1000.0,
  "prescribedMedications": "<script>alert('x')</script>",
  "lifestyleAdvice": "DROP TABLE reports;--",
  "createdAt": "1900-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "updatedAt": "1900-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}

item.name: API6:2023 - Unrestricted Access to Sensitive Business Flows

request.description: Attempt to use admin flow as a regular user.
Send empty value for limit param.
Send string value for integer limit param.
Send zero value for limit param.
